itinerary.title: Singapore Leisure Tour
itinerary.overview:
04 Nights / 05 Days Relaxing Senior-Friendly Singapore Sojourn SERIAL CODE: SG-009 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-SIN-LEI-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Singapore CATEGORY: Premium Senior- Friendly Singapore Package DURATION: 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore City Leisure

TOUR OVERVIEW
Enjoy a comfortable, relaxed, and culturally enriching experience in the vibrant city of Singapore with this TRAGUIN curated leisure itinerary. Specifically designed for senior citizens, this Singapore Leisure Sojourn prioritizes comfort, slow-paced sightseeing, and easy access to local culture, guaranteeing unforgettable memories in the serene and modern environment of Singapore. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days Singapore package (SG-009 / TRG-SIN-LEI-2026): Marina Bay Leisure • Botanical Gardens • River Cruise • Cultural Heritage with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 02: GARDENS BY THE BAY LEISURE

days.title: COMFORTABLE ARRIVAL & MARINA BAY
days.description: Arrive in Singapore. Your private chauffeur transfers you to a premium hotel with easy access and beautiful city views. Savor a relaxed evening at Marina Bay.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: GARDENS BY THE BAY LEISURE
days.description: A gentle tour of the magnificent Gardens by the Bay, focusing on accessible pathways and the stunning flora at a relaxed, senior-friendly pace.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: RIVER CRUISE & CULTURAL HERITAGE
days.description: Enjoy a gentle river cruise, soaking in the city’s skyline from a comfortable seat. Followed by a leisurely visit to heritage areas with minimal walking.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: LEISURELY CITY DISCOVERY
days.description: Spend a peaceful day enjoying the scenic beauty of Singapore’s quiet botanical gardens and upscale city districts at a leisurely, personalized pace.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: COMFORTABLE DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private chauffeur transfers you comfortably to the airport, completing your premium Singapore experience.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
